checks.evidence: WalkForwardEngine.ts does not import @/lib/prisma. All functions are pure (no DB side effects). Verified by test '9. WalkForwardEngine.ts does not import prisma'.
WalkForwardEngine.ts has no fetch(), axios, http.get, or https.get. Verified by test '9b'.
WalkForwardEngine.ts has no openai, anthropic, gpt-, or claude- references. Verified by test '9c'.
WalkForwardEngine.ts writes no DB records. Output is in-memory only. No Prediction table write.
WalkForwardEngine.ts contains no strategy logic, no ranking by strategy metric, no H001-H012 references.

buildWalkForwardSkeleton() calls resolveCurrentDate(config.currentDate). getRegimeContextForDate() calls resolveCurrentDate(date). rankCandidatesRuleOnly() calls resolveCurrentDate(asofDate). Verified by test '1'.
WalkForwardEngine.ts contains no TODAY_CAP string, no hardcoded date constant used as a cap. Verified by test '2'.

regimeContextMap is a function parameter (Map<string, PersistedRegimeContext>). getRegimeContextForDate() only reads from it; does not write. Safety contract field persistedRegimeResultReadOnly: true.
T05B_LOOKBACK_DAYS = 500 exported from WalkForwardEngine.ts. buildWalkForwardSkeleton() defaults to T05B_LOOKBACK_DAYS. Verified by test '3'.
buildMonthlyRebalanceSchedule() exported and tested. Determinism verified by test '4'. Embedded in buildWalkForwardSkeleton() output.
All 10 JSON artifacts created and validated. t05b_walk_forward_skeleton.json parseable. Verified by test '10'.

checks.check: forbidden terms not used as output claims
checks.evidence: Test '8' runs containsForbiddenKey() over full output. 45/45 tests PASS. Field names in safetyContract use noTradingClaims, noPerformanceClaims (not the forbidden words themselves).
WalkForwardEngine.ts has no H001-H012 references. JSON output checked by test '8b'. H_PATTERN = /H0(0[1-9]|1[0-2])\b/ not found in output.

checks.check: no performance conclusion (ROI / win-rate / alpha / edge / profit)
checks.evidence: All placeholder metrics are null. observabilityNote fields contain no performance claims. Safety contract noPerformanceClaims: true.
